metadata.relation_to_case: Neighbor of victim; maternal aunt of Rohan Deshmukh

content: I am Mrs. Meena Kulkarni, aged 58, residing at Flat No. 3, Shivaji Nagar. On 12/03/2024 at around 18:30 hrs, I was looking out my kitchen window to check if the rain had stopped. I saw a man in a dark blue hoodie and jeans standing behind Arjun Deshmukh. He raised a wooden plank and hit him hard on the arm. I saw his face clearly — it was Rohan Deshmukh. He looked angry, and I recognized him immediately. He ran towards the alley behind the store. I called out, but no one responded. I then ran to the shop and told Rajesh to help Arjun. I am certain it was Rohan. He has been threatening Arjun for months over the land dispute. I did not see anyone else near the scene.
